assertions.description: fetch is exposed — the API whose cache hits are now partitioned by navigation initiator.
caches (CacheStorage) is exposed — explicit cache API is unaffected by HTTP cache partitioning.
Request supports the same-origin mode flag — partitioning is orthogonal to mode semantics.
performance.getEntriesByType('resource') still surfaces resource timing — cache key changes are observable here as transferSize changes.
PerformanceNavigationTiming.type is exposed — initiator partitioning specifically affects entries with a navigate/reload type.
